projectDescription: A collection of 200+ useful HTML/JavaScript and Python tools, almost entirely generated using LLMs.
keyFeatures: 200+ standalone browser-based tools requiring no installation
Python scripts executable via uv run from URLs
LLM-assisted development workflow and prompt-driven tools
Privacy-focused - most tools run entirely in the browser
Image and media processing tools (OCR, cropping, conversion)
Text and document utilities (Markdown, JSON, YAML processing)
LLM playground tools for Claude, Gemini, and OpenAI
Bluesky and social media analysis tools
publicApiSurface: HTML Tools - 188+ standalone .html files deployable to any static host
Python Scripts - 28+ uv-compatible scripts runnable from URLs
sloccount.html - Lines of code counter with WebAssembly
sqlite-wasm.html - SQLite query runner in WebAssembly
micropython.html - Python REPL in the browser
python/claude_to_markdown.py - Convert Claude logs to Markdown
python/openai_image.py - Generate images via OpenAI API
python/mistral_ocr.py - PDF OCR via Mistral API
